title: Distributed Trace Analyzer
description:
Each line is `trace_id service_name duration_ms`. Multiple spans can share the same `trace_id`.

Return two sections:
1. For each trace, the total duration (sum of all spans), one per line as `trace_id total_ms`, sorted by total_ms descending.
2. The service with the highest total duration across all traces as `slowest_service name`.

Separate the two sections with a blank line.
constraints: Sum all span durations per trace for total_ms
Sum all durations per service across all traces for slowest_service
If two traces have the same total, sort by trace_id alphabetically

examples.input:
t1 api 100
t1 auth 200
t1 db 150
t2 api 80
t2 db 150
examples.explanation: t1=450ms, t2=230ms. db total=300 (150+150) > api total=180 > auth total=200... wait db=300, auth=200, api=180

test_cases.input:
t1 api 100
t1 auth 200
t1 db 150
t2 api 80
t2 db 150

r1 frontend 50
r1 backend 400
r1 cache 10
r2 frontend 60
r2 backend 300
r3 backend 500
r3 db 200
